title: Federated single-cell QTL meta-analysis reveals novel disease mechanisms
summary: Federated single-cell cis-eQTL meta-analysis across 12 PBMC datasets (2,032 individuals, 2.5M cells). 42% of eQTLs undetected in bulk showed STRONGER enrichment for disease GWAS loci. Reconstructed 6,382 trans-eGenes with upstream regulators. Demonstrates power of cell-type-specific eQTL mapping for complex trait genetics -- methodology directly relevant to noncoding variant interpretation.
